strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x6 | Light Touch n Go
* Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E2MOM 12min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 6 @ 45%
02:00 6 @ 55%
HOLD 5 Sets
04:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 6 @ 65%
08:00 6 @ 65%
10:00 6 @ 65%

metcon.name: Quarterfinals workout 23.5
metcon.description:
For Time
21 Deadlifts 100/80
21 Chest-to-Bar Pull-Ups
15 Deadlifts 125/83
15 Bar Muscle-Ups
9 Deadlifts 140/90
Time Cap: 15 minutes

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Negative Pull Ups
AS SLOW AS POSSIBLE
If you can do more than 5, GO SLOWER
Scale to Jumping Pull Up, NO BANDS

hypertrophy.reasoning: Pressing and pulling dominate today; target antagonists and weak-point muscles to balance and prevent imbalance.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Quarterfinals workout 23.5. For Time, 15 min cap: 21 Deadlifts 100/80, 21 Chest-to-Bar Pull-Ups, 15 Deadlifts 125/83, 15 Bar Muscle-Ups, 9 Deadlifts 140/90. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, biceps, core stability.
